initial_program:
% 1. Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

% output cell for each position in the grid
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% each output cell must receive exactly one colour
1 { output(R, C, Colour) : colour(Colour) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% background colour = colour of the topleft cell
1 { B : colour(B) } 1 :- input(0,0,B).

% a cell is background iff it has colour B
isBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B).

% forbid a nonbackground colour in a cell that is not background
:- output(R, C, V), not isBg(R, C), V != B.

% shift rightside pattern leftwards (column >= 7)
output(R, C-7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C >= 7,
                     isBg(R, C-7),                 % target is background
                     R >= 0, R < N,
                     C-7 >= 0, C-7 < N.

% shift leftside pattern downright (column < 7)
output(R+2, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C < 7,
                     isBg(R+2, C+7),               % target is background
                     R+2 >= 0, R+2 < N,
                     C+7 >= 0, C+7 < N.

% hide auxiliary predicates
#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% 1. Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

% output cell for each position in the grid
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% each output cell must receive exactly one colour
1 { output(R, C, Colour) : colour(Colour) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% background colour = colour of the topleft cell\nbg(B) :- input(0,0,B).\n% a cell is background iff it has colour B\nisBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B), bg(B).

% forbid a nonbackground colour in a cell that is not background
:- output(R, C, V), not isBg(R, C), V != B.

% shift rightside pattern leftwards (column >= 7)
output(R, C-7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C >= 7,
                     isBg(R, C-7),                 % target is background
                     R >= 0, R < N,
                     C-7 >= 0, C-7 < N.

% shift leftside pattern downright (column < 7)
output(R+2, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C < 7,
                     isBg(R+2, C+7),               % target is background
                     R+2 >= 0, R+2 < N,
                     C+7 >= 0, C+7 < N.

% hide auxiliary predicates
#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% 1. Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

% output cell for each position in the grid
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% each output cell must receive exactly one colour
1 { output(R, C, Colour) : colour(Colour) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% background colour = colour of the topleft cell\nbg(B) :- input(0,0,B).\n% a cell is background iff it has colour B\nisBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B), bg(B).

% forbid a nonbackground colour in a cell that is not background
:- output(R, C, V), not isBg(R, C), V != B.

% shift rightside pattern leftwards (column >= 7)
output(R, C-7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C >= 7,
                     isBg(R, C-7),                 % target is background
                     R >= 0, R < N,
                     C-7 >= 0, C-7 < N.

% shift leftside pattern downright (column < 7)
output(R+2, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C < 7,
                     isBg(R+2, C+7),               % target is background
                     R+2 >= 0, R+2 < N,
                     C+7 >= 0, C+7 < N.

% hide auxiliary predicates
#show output/3.

final_program:
% 1. Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

% output cell for each position in the grid
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% each output cell must receive exactly one colour
1 { output(R, C, Colour) : colour(Colour) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% background colour = colour of the topleft cell\nbg(B) :- input(0,0,B).\n% a cell is background iff it has colour B\nisBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B), bg(B).

% forbid a nonbackground colour in a cell that is not background
:- output(R, C, V), not isBg(R, C), V != B.

% shift rightside pattern leftwards (column >= 7)
output(R, C-7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C >= 7,
                     isBg(R, C-7),                 % target is background
                     R >= 0, R < N,
                     C-7 >= 0, C-7 < N.

% shift leftside pattern downright (column < 7)
output(R+2, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V),
                     not isBg(R, C),               % source is nonbackground
                     C < 7,
                     isBg(R+2, C+7),               % target is background
                     R+2 >= 0, R+2 < N,
                     C+7 >= 0, C+7 < N.

% hide auxiliary predicates
#show output/3.
